name: perceptionlab
description: PerceptionLab product foundation, documentation, and local quality gates.

scripts.detect:image: UV_CACHE_DIR=.perceptionlab/cache/uv uv run --project worker perception-worker detect-image
scripts.detect:webcam: UV_CACHE_DIR=.perceptionlab/cache/uv uv run --project worker perception-worker detect-webcam
scripts.detect:webcam-live: UV_CACHE_DIR=.perceptionlab/cache/uv uv run --project worker perception-worker detect-webcam-live
scripts.install:worker:ml: cd worker && UV_CACHE_DIR=../.perceptionlab/cache/uv uv sync --extra ml --group dev
scripts.install:deps: npm run bootstrap:env && npm run install:rust && npm run install:worker:ml
scripts.check:worker: cd worker && UV_CACHE_DIR=../.perceptionlab/cache/uv uv run pytest
scripts.quality: npm test && npm run validate:docs && npm run validate:openapi && npm run validate:seed && npm run validate:bdd && npm run validate:bdd-runner && npm run validate:conventions && npm run validate:p0-bootstrap && npm run validate:migrations && npm run check:rust && npm run check:worker && npm run check:web && npm run lint:architecture
